channel.title: Pattaya Visa Help — Thailand visa news
channel.description: Thailand visa policy updates, rule changes, and step-by-step guides from Pattaya Visa Help.

item.title: SMART Visa Application 2026 — BOI Checklist & Categories
item.description: Thailand SMART Visa 2026 application — T, I, E, S categories, BOI-endorsed companies, documents, processing time, and who should use DTV instead.

item.title: Permanent Residency Thailand 2026 — Eligibility & Pattaya Timeline
item.description: Thailand PR eligibility 2026 — investment, employment, marriage, retirement categories, annual quota, 3-year wait, and Pattaya application patterns.

item.title: Overstay Voluntary Surrender Thailand 2026 — Fines & Blacklist
item.description: Thailand overstay voluntary surrender 2026 — immigration fine ฿500/day, max ฿20K, blacklist thresholds, and when to surrender vs extend in Pattaya.

item.title: O-A Health Insurance 2026 — THB 3M Requirement Explained
item.description: O-A retirement visa health insurance 2026 — THB 3 million coverage rule, approved insurers, embassy vs immigration checks, and Pattaya retiree mistakes.

item.title: Tourist Visa Extension 2026 — 30 Days at Immigration Pattaya
item.description: Tourist visa extension Thailand 2026 — one 30-day extension at immigration, TM7, fee, TM30, and when to switch to DTV or Non-O instead.

item.title: DTV Tax Residency 2026 — When Remote Workers Owe Thai Tax
item.description: DTV visa tax residency Thailand 2026 — 180-day rule, foreign income remittance tax, Royal Decree 743 exclusion, and Pattaya nomad structuring.

item.title: Marriage Non-O Extension Documents 2026 — Pattaya Checklist
item.description: Marriage Non-O visa extension documents 2026 in Pattaya — Thai spouse ID, house registration, income proof, TM30, and Jomtien rejection patterns.

item.title: Work Permit Renewal Pattaya 2026 — Docs & Timeline
item.description: Work permit renewal in Pattaya/Chonburi 2026 — 90-day deadline, employer docs, visa sync, Department of Employment checklist, and common delays.

item.title: Thailand Privilege Elite Renewal 2026 — Upgrade, Downgrade, Timeline
item.description: Privilege Elite renewal and tier changes in 2026 — when to apply, points transfer, downgrade to lower tier, and what happens if you let membership lapse.

item.title: Re-Entry Permit Pattaya 2026 — Jomtien Single vs Multiple
item.description: Re-entry permit Thailand 2026 at Jomtien Immigration — single ฿1,000 vs multiple ฿3,800, when you need it, and what happens if you leave without one.

item.title: LTR BOI Application Checklist 2026 — Documents & Timeline
item.description: LTR visa BOI application checklist 2026 — Wealthy Pensioner, WGC, Work-from-Thailand categories, document list, processing time, and common BOI rejection reasons.

item.title: ED Visa MOE Accreditation Check 2026 — Avoid Fake Schools
item.description: Verify MOE-accredited ED visa schools in Thailand 2026 — moe.go.th check, Pattaya language schools, rejection patterns, and switching schools mid-study.

item.title: Non-O Extension Documents 2026 — Jomtien Immigration Checklist
item.description: Non-O retirement extension documents 2026 at Jomtien Immigration — bank letter, TM30, TM7, photos, income proof, and common rejection reasons in Pattaya.

item.title: TM30 Landlord Refusal in Thailand 2026 — What to Do in Pattaya
item.description: Landlord won't file TM30? 2026 guide for Pattaya tenants — self-filing, extension blocks, and fixes before Jomtien Immigration.

item.title: DTV Bank Seasoning by Embassy 2026 — 3 vs 6 Month Guide
item.description: DTV ฿500K seasoning by embassy in 2026 — Vientiane 3 months vs Europe 6 months, statement format, rejection patterns.

item.title: 90-Day Report Online in Thailand 2026 — TM47 Portal Guide
item.description: Thailand 90-day report online 2026 — immigration.go.th TM47 portal, TM30 requirements, deadlines, and Jomtien walk-in backup.

item.title: LTR Royal Decree 743 in 2026 — Who Actually Gets 0% Tax on Foreign Income
item.description: Royal Decree 743 explained for LTR holders in 2026 — Wealthy Pensioner, Wealthy Global Citizen, Work-from-Thailand Professional. Who qualifies, who does not, and the filing steps in Pattaya.

item.title: DTV 180-Day Extension in Thailand 2026 — Pattaya & Jomtien Guide
item.description: DTV 180-day extension guide 2026 — TM7 form, ฿1,900 fee, passport photos, proof of address, and common rejection reasons at Pattaya Jomtien Immigration.

item.title: Jomtien Immigration Office 2026 — Queue Times & What to Expect
item.description: Jomtien Immigration Office Pattaya 2026 — typical queue times by day, what to bring for extensions and 90-day reports, and costly mistakes we see every week.

item.title: 2026 Thailand Visa Year in Review — DTV, LTR, TM30
item.description: The Thailand visa year 2026 reviewed — DTV maturity, LTR Royal Decree 743 adoption, TM30 enforcement crackdown, tourist visa-exempt rollback.

item.title: TDAC Step by Step — Thailand Digital Arrival Card 2026 Guide
item.description: How to fill the Thailand Digital Arrival Card. Step-by-step: passport, travel info, accommodation, health declaration. Free at tdac.immigration.go.th.

item.title: Thailand 60→30 Day Visa-Exempt Rollback — What We Know
item.description: Thailand cabinet reviewing 60→30 day visa-exempt rollback. What is announced, when it might change, how to plan.

item.title: Every Thailand Visa Change Going Into 2026 — Recap
item.description: TDAC mandatory, 17→7 visa code consolidation, 60→30 day visa-exempt rollback. What every traveler and expat needs to know in 2026.
